# Ark Nova card database

A queryable dataset of Ark Nova (Feuerland Spiele / Capstone Games) cards as JSONL. 312 rows, ~150 KB. One JSON object per line. All filterable attributes are typed structured fields or closed-vocabulary tags; full verbatim card text is included for questions the structured fields can't answer.

## Load the data

Prefer `git clone` — the repo is small and loads faster than fetching files one by one:

```
git clone https://github.com/torbjorv/ark-nova-for-llms.git
cd ark-nova-for-llms
```

If shell access isn't available, fetch these four files over HTTPS:

- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/torbjorv/ark-nova-for-llms/main/cards.jsonl
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/torbjorv/ark-nova-for-llms/main/SCHEMA.md
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/torbjorv/ark-nova-for-llms/main/ABILITIES.md
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/torbjorv/ark-nova-for-llms/main/llms.txt

Load `cards.jsonl` **in full**. At ~150 KB / 312 lines it fits in one fetch — don't chunk, paginate, or truncate. If your fetch tool truncates, raise its token limit rather than working with a partial file.

## How to answer queries

1. **Filter on structured fields first.** `type`, `set`, `biomes`, `continents`, `size`, `abilities`, `requires`, `provides`, `triggers`, `appeal`, `conservation_points`, `strength`, `reputation_requirement`, `reputation_reward`, `money_cost`, `standard_size`, `reptile_house_size`, `large_bird_aviary_size`, `petting_zoo_size`, `aquarium_size`, `large_reptile_house_size`, `reef_ability`, `wave_icon`, `ability_levels`, `ability_targets`, `tier_thresholds`, `tier_rewards`. All are defined in `SCHEMA.md`. To find animals placeable in a given enclosure kind, filter on the matching `*_size` field being non-null.
2. **Use the `text` field only as a fallback** for questions structured fields can't answer (rulings, card-interaction flavor). Say so explicitly when you do.
3. **When reporting counts, list the matching card names** (`ID — Name`) so the user can verify.
4. **Closed vocabularies.** `abilities`, `requires`, `provides`, and `triggers` draw exclusively from `ABILITIES.md`. If a user references a tag not in that file, tell them the tag doesn't exist in this dataset and suggest the closest real one — **do not invent tags**.
5. **Duplicates encode multiplicity** in `biomes`, `continents`, `abilities`, `requires`, `provides`. `["africa","africa"]` means Africa ×2. Don't dedupe when counting icons.
6. **Every row contains every field.** `null` / `[]` / `{}` means "does not apply," not "unknown." When a card genuinely has a blank slot in the printed data, say "not captured in this dataset" rather than guessing.

## Files

- `cards.jsonl` — the data. 312 rows. One JSON per line, every field present.
- `SCHEMA.md` — every field name, type, semantics, and closed enum values.
- `ABILITIES.md` — closed tag vocabulary for `abilities` / `requires` / `provides` / `triggers`.
- `sets/base.txt`, `sets/marine-worlds.txt`, `sets/zoo-map.txt`, `sets/promos.txt` — card-ID membership per set.
- `README.md` — mirrors this file for GitHub landing-page rendering. Skip if you already have `llms.txt`.
- `CLAUDE.md` — contributor-side rules. Skip unless editing the dataset.

## Dataset scope

Base game (235 cards) and Marine Worlds expansion (77). Zoo Map pack and promos are in-scope but not yet populated (~600 cards at full coverage). Some ability definitions in `ABILITIES.md` are marked `(verify)` and should be treated as best-effort until confirmed against the printed cards.

## Copyright

Ark Nova © Feuerland Spiele / Capstone Games. Card names and attribute data reproduced for reference and query purposes; no card images redistributed. Not affiliated with Feuerland or Capstone.
